panels.title: Active Gateways (range)

targets.expr: count(sum by(instance)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])) > 0) or vector(0)

panels.description: Gateways that served at least one LLM request in the selected range.

panels.title: LLM Requests (range)

targets.expr: sum(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Recognized LLM requests in the selected range.

panels.title: LLM Application Success

targets.expr: 100 * sum(increase(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode", outcome="success"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum(increase(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode"}[$__range])), 1)

panels.description: Final application outcomes, including failures after HTTP 200 streaming headers.

panels.title: Gateways with Failures

targets.expr: count(sum by(instance)(increase(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode", outcome!="success"}[$__range])) > 0) or vector(0)

panels.description: Distinct gateways with at least one final non-success application outcome.

panels.title: Active Sessions
panels.description: Stateful X-Session-Id sessions currently registered.

panels.title: Pool Acquire p95
panels.description: 95th percentile wait to acquire a warm worker slot.

panels.title: Kiro Credits (range)
panels.description: Kiro credits consumed in the selected range.

panels.title: Unhealthy or Stalled

targets.expr: count(max by(instance)((gw_pool_healthy{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} == 0) or ((gw_pool_busy{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} == gw_pool_alive{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"}) and (gw_pool_busy{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} == gw_pool_size{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"}) and (gw_pool_size{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} > 0) and (time() - gw_pool_last_progress_timestamp_seconds{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} > 300) and (gw_pool_last_progress_timestamp_seconds{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id"} > 0)))) or vector(0)

panels.description: Gateways currently unhealthy or fully saturated with no pool progress for more than five minutes.

panels.title: Active Gateways Over Time
panels.description: Gateways actively serving LLM traffic, not merely reporting inventory.

targets.expr: sum(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(count((sum by(instance)(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__rate_interval]))) > 0), 1)
topk(20, sum by(instance)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])))
topk(20, sum by(skill)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])))
topk(20, sum by(client, surface)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Attribution Completeness

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill="none", client=~"$client"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

100 * sum(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client="none"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

panels.description: Share of traffic attributed to skill="none" or client="none".

panels.title: Application Outcomes Over Time

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode", outcome="success"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

100 * sum(rate(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode", outcome!="success"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

panels.description: Application-level completion, including failures after an HTTP 200 stream begins.

targets.expr: sum by(surface, outcome)(rate(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", outcome=~"$outcome", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Top Affected Gateways

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by(instance)(increase(gw_llm_request_outcomes_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway_id", surface=~"$surface", stream=~"$streaming", session_mode=~"$session_mode", outcome!="success"}[$__range])))

panels.description: Gateways with the most final application failures in the selected range.

panels.title: Seconds Since Pool Progress
panels.description: Zero timestamps are excluded; never-initialized pools do not appear as epoch-sized ages.

panels.title: Gateway Health Matrix
panels.description: Current serving posture per gateway. Timestamp ages exclude zero values.

panels.title: Goroutines (if go_* shipped)
panels.description: Requires GW_METRICS_SERIES_PREFIXES to include go_; the default excludes it.

panels.title: Gateways Reporting Now
panels.description: Reporting installations are inventory, not the same as active gateways serving users.
